  • Method Details

    • actualVersion

      public static String actualVersion()
      Returns the actual version of OverrunGL from the jar file.

      the actual version of OverrunGL from the jar file

    • setApiLogger

      public static void setApiLogger(Consumer<String> logger)
      Sets the API logger.
      Parameters:
      logger - the logger. pass null to reset to the default logger.

    • apiLogger

      public static Consumer<String> apiLogger()
      Returns the API logger. Defaults to System.err.
      Returns:
      the API logger

    • apiLog

      public static void apiLog(String message)
      Logs a message with the current API logger.
      Parameters:
      message - the message to be logged.
